query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `referrals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `referrerId` int NOT NULL,
  `referralCode` varchar(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `referredEmail` varchar(255),
  `referredUserId` int,
  `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `creditApplied` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `convertedAt` timestamp NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AU4feyxZpdZ8pZ.root --database 2ZSCuHTjdaVo7h4vqS7dZB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `referrals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `referrerId` int NOT NULL,
  `referralCode` varchar(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `referredEmail` varchar(255),
  `referredUserId` int,
  `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `creditApplied` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `convertedAt` timestamp NULL
);
